# Liquid Glass UI

> A React component library for building liquid glass interfaces. CSS-variable-driven theming, Radix UI primitives, glassmorphic design system.

## Documentation Sections

- [components/Button](components/Button): Button component — contained, outlined, text variants with color and size options
- [components/Card](components/Card): Card surface — outlined/elevated variants with CardContent and CardMedia sub-components
- [components/AppBar](components/AppBar): App bar header surface with glass effect
- [components/Paper](components/Paper): Paper surface — elevation or outlined variants
- [components/Dialog](components/Dialog): Dialog modal — compound component (Root, Trigger, Content, Title, Description, Actions, Close)
- [components/AlertDialog](components/AlertDialog): Alert dialog — compound component for destructive confirmations
- [components/Select](components/Select): Select dropdown — Radix-based with label, options, placeholder support
- [components/TextField](components/TextField): Text field input — supports label, helper text, error state, multiline
- [components/Chip](components/Chip): Chip — filled/outlined variants for tags and status indicators
- [components/Avatar](components/Avatar): Avatar — image with fallback, Radix-based, configurable size
- [components/Fab](components/Fab): Floating action button
- [components/IconButton](components/IconButton): Icon button — small/medium sizes
- [components/Separator](components/Separator): Separator — horizontal/vertical orientation, Radix-based
- [components/Skeleton](components/Skeleton): Skeleton loader — text, circular, rectangular variants
- [components/Spinner](components/Spinner): Spinner — SVG loading indicator with configurable size and color
- [components/DropdownMenu](components/DropdownMenu): Dropdown menu — compound component (Root, Trigger, Content, Item)
- [theme/overview](theme/overview): Full theming guide — ThemeProvider, createTheme, hooks, component overrides, recipes
- [theme/css-variables](theme/css-variables): Complete CSS variable reference — all --lg-* tokens with defaults
- [theme/tokens/glass](theme/tokens/glass): Glass physics tokens — blur, opacity, surface, border, reflection, easing, shadows
- [theme/tokens/palette](theme/tokens/palette): Palette tokens — primary, error, warning, info, success, text, background, action
- [theme/tokens/radius](theme/tokens/radius): Radius tokens — sm, md, lg
- [theme/tokens/shadows](theme/tokens/shadows): Shadow tokens — sm, md, lg
- [theme/tokens/transitions](theme/tokens/transitions): Transition tokens — fast, normal
- [theme/tokens/typography](theme/tokens/typography): Typography tokens — fontFamily
- [theme/recipes](theme/recipes): Code recipes — brand palette, dark-only overrides, runtime toggle, plain CSS override
